query:
SELECT c.name, c.email 
FROM quotations q 
JOIN clients c ON q.clientId = c.id 
WHERE q.quotationNumber = 'COT-2026-620';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT c.name, c.email 
FROM quotations q 
JOIN clients c ON q.clientId = c.id 
WHERE q.quotationNumber = 'COT-2026-620';
